title: Bee Removal in Scarsdale, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Scarsdale, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and properties. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Scarsdale, NY, protecting your family and property from unwanted bee colonies. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee hives from residential and commercial properties in Westchester County with humane, effective methods. Whether you've discovered bees in your attic, walls, or yard, we offer fast response and complete removal for $350-$550.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Westchester communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven bee removal techniques that prioritize safety and prevention. Our Scarsdale clients trust us for same-day service, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results that keep bees from returning.
localContext: Scarsdale's beautiful tree-lined streets and historic homes, from the Heathcote area to Fox Meadow, provide ideal nesting sites for honeybees and carpenter bees during warmer months. The village's mix of Tudor and Colonial-style residences, along with properties near the Bronx River Parkway and Scarsdale Golf Club, often experience seasonal bee activity requiring professional removal.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Scarsdale range from $350 to $550 depending on the hive location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees humanely in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize humane bee removal whenever possible. For honeybees, we work with local beekeepers to relocate hives safely. For aggressive species or dangerous locations, we use targeted treatments that protect your property while minimizing environmental impact.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to bee problems in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Scarsdale and Westchester County. If you're experiencing an urgent bee situation near your home or business, call us immediately and we'll prioritize your safety.

faqs.question: What types of bees do you remove in Scarsdale homes?
faqs.answer: We remove all bee species common to Westchester, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and yellow jackets. Our technicians identify the species and use appropriate removal methods for each situation, whether the hive is in your walls, attic, chimney, or exterior structures.
